{{CargoRelic
|name=Kemetic Postcard
|class_id=20210
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=While scouting for info about the Demon God in Kemet, the snail also recorded a lot of local customs, which were brought together in this postcard. You can read it to kill time and post it online to get many likes!
|fame=21
|art=26
|fth=12
|civ=16
|tech=15
|ss1=Kemetic Museum Medal Output +5
|ss2=Kemetic Museum Medal Output +10
|ss3=Kemetic Museum Medal Output +15
|ss4=Kemetic Museum Medal Output +15
|ss7=Kemetic Museum Medal Output +15<br> (Awakened)
}}
